title: Ametek (AME) Up 7.4% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
text: Ametek (AME) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: AME vs. TER: Which Stock Should Value Investors Buy Now?
text: Investors with an interest in Electronics - Testing Equipment stocks have likely encountered both Ametek (AME) and Teradyne (TER). But which of these two stocks offers value investors a better bang for their buck right now?

title: AMETEK Releases 2023 Sustainability Report
text: BERWYN, Pa. , Nov. 7, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- AMETEK (NYSE: AME) is proud to release its 2023 Sustainability Report that summarizes the meaningful progress towards the company's shared purpose of making a safer, sustainable, and more productive world a reality.

title: AMETEK Declares Quarterly Dividend
text: BERWYN, Pa. , Nov. 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Board of Directors of AMETEK, Inc. (NYSE: AME) declared a regular quarterly dividend of $0.25 per share for the fourth quarter ending December 31, 2023.
